high_descs: Move to face the head board of the bed where the purple pillow is
Pick up the purple pillow on the bed
Carry the purple pillow over to the night stand with the lamp on top of it
anns.task_desc: Carry a purple pillow while turning on a lamp
anns.task_dec: Carry a purple pillow while turning on a lamp
robot_human_memory1-1: Human: Hi, there, I was thinking about rearranging the living room a bit. I noticed last night that the lighting was a bit off. Can you carry out a light analysis of the room for me?
Human: I thought so too. I was considering moving the floor lamp next to the sofa. What do you think? It should provide better lighting for reading.

Human: Good, that's settled then. While we're at it, I've been thinking about adding some color to the room as well. I noticed the purple pillow in the bedroom. What if we brought it into the living room?
Human: I'm glad you agree. So, the next time you're in the bedroom, could you bring the purple pillow into the living room? But remember to be careful, I don't want it to get dirty.
anns.task_desc1-1: Human: Yes, actually. Could you carry the purple pillow while turning on the lamp? I want to see how the light plays off the color of the pillow.

robot_human_memory3-1: Human: Hi. I want to rearrange the living room, the lighting seems off. Can you analyze it?
Human: I thought of moving the floor lamp by the sofa. Good for reading. Mug Hero found it dim for his science experiments too.
Human: Alright. Also, I want to add color. What about it from the bedroom? Mug Hero likes it.
Human: Okay. Next time you're in the bedroom, could you bring it? But be careful not to dirty it. Mug Hero wouldn't like that.
anns.task_desc3-1: Human: Yes. Carry the purple pillow while turning on the lamp? I want to see the light on the pillow's color. Mug Hero would be interested in that too.

Human: Thought so. I wanna move the lamp near the sofa. Better for reading. Bowl Ace likes to sit there with his science books.
Human: Thanks. Also, I wanna add color. There's a it in the bedroom. What if we brought it here? Bowl Ace says color changes a room's mood.
Human: Glad you agree. Can you bring it here? Bowl Ace would love that. Be careful, don't want it dirty.
anns.task_desc3-2: Human: Yeah. Can you transport the violet cushion while activating the light source? I wanna see how light affects the cushion's color. Bowl Ace mentions how colors respond to light. Let's see.

high_descs: Turn around and walk to the middle of the room, then turn right and walk to the window, then turn left to face the bed.
Pick up the purple pillow from the bed.
Turn left and walk to the nightstand to the right of the door.
Turn on the lamp that is on the nightstand.
anns.task_desc: Look at a pillow under the light of a lamp.

high_descs: Turn left and go to the desk then turn left and go as far as the bed then turn right and go alongside the bed to the nightstand then turn left to face the nightstand
Pick up the pillow from the bed
Turn left and go past the end of the bed then turn right and go to the safe then turn left and go to the table with the lamp on it
anns.task_desc: Examine a pillow by the light of a table lamp
